sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this game

special_mechanics.name: Gravity Reversal (G-Pill)
special_mechanics.description: Power-up that reverses gravity, allowing the player character Mylo to walk on the ceiling

special_mechanics.name: Rocket Gun
special_mechanics.description: Primary weapon to destroy enemies and obstacles; player starts with 5 rockets and can collect more

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. Wikipedia source provides only high-level gameplay mechanics and narrative information. No quantitative movement physics data (speeds, accelerations, gravity values, frame data) is documented for this game. The article describes gameplay features like the gravity-reversal mechanic and level structure but does not contain technical physics parameters.
